driver_selection.selection_logic: Use IfxEgtm_* APIs when available on TC4D7; if not present in the SDK/toolchain, fall back to IfxGtm_Pwm configured for subModule=ATOM to drive the same ATOM channels.

conflicts: Device/package mismatch: requirements specify DEVICE_TC4D7 with IFX_PIN_PACKAGE_BGA292_COM, template provides DEVICE_TC4DX with IFX_PIN_PACKAGE_BGA436_COM
IfxEgtm_PinMap macros for P20.8, P20.9, P20.10, P20.11, P20.12, P20.13 not found in provided template context; cannot resolve TOUT mapping
ATOM cluster index, ATOM instance-to-TOUT mapping, and CDTM[d]/channel indices not verifiable without TC4D7-specific PinMap header

rationale.device_and_package: Updated to TC4D7 with IFX_PIN_PACKAGE_BGA292_COM to match KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE requirements, ensuring correct PinMap applicability.
rationale.pwm_peripheral_choice: EGTM0.ATOM0 selected to provide six synchronized PWM outputs (three complementary pairs) suitable for a 3-phase inverter using CDTM dead-time and complementary output features.
rationale.channel_allocation: Channels 0–5 of ATOM0 map to phases U/V/W as HS/LS pairs to keep pairs within the same ATOM cluster for optimal synchronization and dead-time insertion.
rationale.clocks: 25 MHz crystal and 500 MHz system frequency retained; eGTM clocking derived from system PLL per TC4D7 UM eGTM CMU chapter to meet PWM timing/resolution.

references: AURIX TC4D7 User Manual: eGTM chapter (CMU/ATOM) for clocking and ATOM operation
AURIX TC4D7 Datasheet / Pin Assignment Tables for P20.[8..13] eGTM outputs
Infineon iLLD: IfxEgtm_PinMap.h for TC4D7 (TOUT mapping and pin macros)
documentation.pinmap_notes: Pin functions and macros populated for P20.8–P20.13 to document EGTM0.ATOM0 channel-to-TOUT mapping for TC4D7; each phase uses one HS/LS complementary pair.
